recommendations.title: Our Struggles

recommendations.title: Belle
recommendations.overview: Suzu is a 17-year-old high-school student living in a rural town with her father. Wounded by the loss of her mother at a young age, Suzu one day discovers the massive online world "U" and dives into this alternate reality as her avatar, Belle. Before

recommendations.title: Leap Year
recommendations.overview: Journalist Laura works at home, isolating herself from others. While she lies to her mother and brother, Raul, on the phone about having an active social life, Laura's days consist of gazing at her neighbors, eating canned food and going to clubs to

recommendations.title: Cria!
recommendations.overview: Ana, an eight-year-old girl living in Madrid with her grandmother and two sisters, mourns the death of her mother.

recommendations.title: Loving
recommendations.overview: Laura and Carlos love each other as if every day was the last, and perhaps that first love intensity is what will tear them apart a year later.

recommendations.title: Kid Cannabis
recommendations.overview: An eighteen year old high school drop out and his twenty-seven year old friend start trafficking marijuana across the border of Canada in order to make money and their lives are changed forever.

recommendations.title: The Predators
recommendations.overview: This is the story of two completely opposite households: the Pavone are intellectual and bourgeois, the Vismara are proletarian and fascists. They are two tribes sharing the same jungle: Rome. A trivial accident brings these two poles together. The m

recommendations.title: Student Services
recommendations.overview: Nineteen-year-old Laura is stressed by her first year at college when money worries distract her from her studies and so, desperate for cash, she answers an online advertisement for intimate companionship that leads her down a dangerous path.

recommendations.title: Steins;Gate: The Movie - Load Region of Déjà Vu
recommendations.overview: One year after the events of the anime, Rintarou begins to feel the repercussions of extensive time travel, and eventually completely fades from reality. Kurisu, being the only companion to remember him, now must find a way to bring him back.
recommendations.director: Hiroshi Hamasaki, Takuya Sato, Kanji Wakabayashi

recommendations.title: Cargo
recommendations.overview: The story of CARGO takes place on rusty space-freighter KASSANDRA on its way to Station 42. The young medic LAURA is the only one awake on board while the rest of the crew lies frozen in hibernation sleep. In 4 months will Laura's shift be over.
